next_steps: Obtain MRI of the brain and spine with contrast to evaluate for nerve root enhancement or parasitic tracks
Send CSF for Angiostrongylus cantonensis PCR and serological testing
Perform serological testing for parasites (Angiostrongylus, Strongyloides, Schistosoma, Cysticercosis)
Request urgent Neurology and Infectious Disease consultation
Continue broad-spectrum empiric antibiotics and acyclovir until viral/bacterial etiologies are ruled out
Provide aggressive supportive care for encephalopathy and monitor for increased intracranial pressure
